title: Careers at CoinSwitch
text:
This website uses cookies to give you the best experience on our website.  Got it!  Learn more

#### Magical values that drive us together

* **Crazy about Customers** 
 *Our goal, every day, is to ensure our users' experience is the best possible. Their problems are ours too. In fact, we take it personally and go the extra mile to solve them.*
* **Where Logic meets Magic** 
 *We're dreamers but we also like to stay grounded. Data & analytics are the bedrock of our decision-making, with a dash of the PeepalCo awesome sauce.*
* **Lights, Camera, Bias for Action!** 
 *We're thoughtful and deliberate about what we do. But we have a strong bias for action. We lead by example, with more than just words.*
* **No Hate, just Innovate** 
 *We like to keep things positive while we work on changing the world with path-breaking ideas. We come with diverse stories but everyone has a place here.*
* **Stand up for your Beliefs** 
 *We speak up and disagree with respect when we mean it. We own what we commit to and drive it to larger organization goals.*
* **Together, we Scale** 
 *We treat each other with love and empathy. We’re a team of dedicated, passionate people, bound by a common goal, who thrive on collaboration. Our progress is only real when shared.*

.jpg>)

## WHO WE ARE

#### 400+ People strong

What started off as a small group is today a strong rocket ship of more than 400 employees. We’re driven and committed to building the best in class products for our users.

#### customer obsessed

A cornerstone of our culture is to always keep our users at the heart of everything we do. We are dedicated to always go the extra mile for our customers.

#### MAKING MONEY EQUAL FOR ALL

We’re building a platform that democratises investments for everyone — making them simple, safe and accessible to every Indian. Our success lies in your wealth creation.

## Come join us

Locations Bengaluru Mumbai Remote

Departments Brand Branding & Marketing Corporate Communication Engineering IT Support Legal Lemonn Operations Operations P&L - Indian Equity P&L Equity Business Product
